prompt: Create a glamorous vertical high-fashion red-carpet photograph at the Met Gala, featuring exactly three elegant anime-inspired female celebrities posing on wide midnight-blue stairs in front of a crowded paparazzi background. The scene is cinematic, ultra-detailed, realistic, and editorial, with bright camera flashes, soft bokeh lights, white floral hedges, a dark starry night sky, and dramatic luxury-event lighting. The three subjects should have smooth anonymized/blurred faces with no visible facial features, but highly detailed hair, jewelry, bodies, and gowns. Left subject: petite figure leaning slightly left, dark black hair in a polished low bun, wearing a strapless silver crystal corset bodice with a deep navy satin mermaid skirt, ornate gold-and-silver embroidery down the side, draped navy fabric at the hip, dangling tassel ornament, choker necklace, bracelets, and a small train. Center subject: tallest figure standing confidently with one hand on her hip, lavender-purple hair styled in a large sculptural braided updo, wearing a strapless silver beaded corset gown with a deep navy velvet diagonal sash over one shoulder, silver satin draped skirt, high thigh slit, dark navy embroidered side panel, long flowing silver train, sparkling brooch at the shoulder, layered necklace, rings, and strappy high heels. Right subject: poised figure with very long straight rose-pink hair in a high ponytail flowing to the right, wearing a black velvet strapless couture gown with dense silver pearl-and-crystal chains, black opera gloves, ornate choker, fitted bodice, large dark navy rose-shaped fabric sculpture at the hip, long black and navy velvet train, and one hand on her hip. Use a rich palette of midnight navy, silver, black velvet, and rose pink, elaborate couture beadwork, pearl draping, embroidered floral appliqués, glossy satin, velvet textures, and dramatic Met Gala styling. Composition should be full-body, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio, three figures centered and filling the frame, photographed from a slightly low angle to emphasize grandeur. Make the image look like a real luxury fashion photo rather than a cartoon, while keeping subtle anime-character-inspired silhouettes and hair colors. Avoid logos, readable text, watermarks, extra people in the foreground, distorted hands, or additional main subjects.
